texto: The field of scientific abstraction encompasses independent kingdoms of ideas and of experiments and within these, rulers whose fame outlasts the centuries. But they are not the only kings in science. He also is a king who guides the spirit of his contemporaries by knowledge and creative work, by teaching and research in the field of applied science, and who conquers for science provinces which have only been raided by craftsmen.
explicacao: Citação de Fritz Haber sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The field of scientific abstraction encompasses independent kingdoms of ideas and of experiments …” articula sabedoria, abstraction, applied-science em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
